decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_layout: card-style — hero content inside a floating card/panel
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
scroll_animation: minimal — subtle fade-up on sections (CSS only, short delay)
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
image_treatment: no clip — square with heavy shadow
quirk: add a subtle CSS grid/dot pattern visible on the background
